article_title: B.C. Reg. 201/2025 – British Columbia Securities Commission

briefs.title: BC Securities Commission updates filing fees and adds new prospectus category effective November 2025
briefs.summary: The BC Securities Commission has amended its system fee rules (the fees companies pay when submitting official filings through the SEDAR+ online platform) to add a new filing category called a 'WKSI base shelf prospectus' (a streamlined fundraising document used by large, well-known companies) and to update the fee schedules tied to specific time periods.
briefs.action_required: Check if your business files securities documents through SEDAR+ and review the updated fee schedules for your filing type.

key_dates.label: BC Securities Commission updated system fee rules take effect
BC Securities Commission new reference period fee schedule starts — WKSI filings
